Call ID: EXT-015
Type: external
Date: 2026-06-25
Topic: Adoption & Onboarding
Participants: Grace (account manager); Zara (customer)
------------------------------------------------------------
AM (Grace): Hi Zara, thanks for making time today. How are things going on your side?
Customer (Zara): Our new hires are struggling to get onboarded to the tool.
AM (Grace): We have an onboarding track that could help your new hires ramp faster.
Customer (Zara): The team is generally positive, but there are gaps.
AM (Grace): Let's look at the usage data and find where people drop off.
Customer (Zara): I feel better about the direction. Let's check in again soon.
AM (Grace): Thank you — I'll send a recap with clear next steps and owners by end of day.
